title: Dr Lal PathLabs is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Dr Lal PathLabs is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Dr Lal PathLabs in Patna offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Dr Lal PathLabs:
Dr Lal PathLabs is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dr Lal PathLabs!
